name: superdev
description: 14-skill toolkit + 49 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds with a self-improving memory loop. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic (hooks auto-detect pnpm/npm/yarn/bun). v1.4.0 makes completion ENFORCED, not advisory: a machine-checkable Definition-of-Done gate (done-gate.sh Stop hook + COMPLETION_LEDGER.json + the new superdev-done skill) blocks any 'done' claim while typecheck/lint/build/integration/completeness/security/qa/brutal are red; the wave gate now blocks on lint errors and newly-introduced suppressions (eslint-disable/@ts-ignore/as-any); and the self-learning loop actually fires (broader frustration detection, real-agent SubagentStop matchers, a SessionStart reader, and additionalContext injection instead of dead stderr echoes). v1.3.0 adds frontend-modular-architecture (opinionated structure: pages ≤ 100 lines, components ≤ 200 lines, dedicated Zustand stores per module, wizards split per-step, drawers/modals/popovers in parts/<name>/ folders with shadcn Portal primitives) and frontend-refactoring (atomic ONE-MODULE conversion in a single commit on a feature branch — deep plan, behavior baseline, atomic execute, zero-drift verify, hard rollback). Other skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas (now with Phase 4.5 modular-decomposition before rewiring), exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning.
